title: Villagers drop egg
description: This data pack means that when you kill a villager, he will drop his egg. This will make it easier for you to bring villagers to your base.
body:
This data pack means that when you kill a villager, he will drop his egg.
Also works on zombie villagers
This will make it easier for you to bring villagers to your base.

This video demonstrates the operation of the "Villagers Drops Egg" data pack.:https://youtu.be/wpa3occI3MU](https://youtu.be/wpa3occI3MU
